candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label on the income statement; preferred primary revenue row.
Alternative revenue label that appears to duplicate Revenue; useful as fallback across years.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not revenue.
Balance sheet/ancillary interest item, not top-line revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not a sum. Revenue and Total revenue appear duplicative; later code should take the first non-missing value.
No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales row is present on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; per rule, include in XSGA as well when separately reported and not obviously embedded in another selected SG&A bucket.
Clear administrative overhead component.
Likely operating overhead bucket; row exists even though preview values are blank.
Operating overhead bucket; not a total/subtotal.
Typical SG&A overhead component; row exists even though preview values are blank.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|misclassified. No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present, so selected the best overhead component rows. Included Research and development expenses in XSGA as well because it is separately reported above operating profit and should be removable via XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line is clearly reported above operating profit.

candidates.why: Looks like a header/mostly empty line; less preferable than populated recurring components.
Total finance cost line, but underlying recurring interest components are also reported; avoid total when components exist.

candidates.row_label: Interest and Finance Charges Paid/Payable for Lease Liabilities and Financial Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest/finance charge component.
Explicit interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Lease-interest supplemental disclosure that appears duplicative of part of the finance-charge row; less preferable for primary mapping.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest and Finance Charges Paid/Payable for Lease Liabilities and Financial Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest-related components and excluded Financial Costs total to avoid double counting with underlying components. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row because it appears duplicative of part of the finance-charge disclosure.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not the preferred total owner equity line.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Acceptable fallback total equity line, but less preferred because BE should exclude NCI when possible.
Balancing row, not appropriate when a proper equity line exists.
Total balance sheet liabilities and equity, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Use as priority list. Preferred parent-shareholder equity line first; Total Equity included as fallback only.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line is present. Total Equity equals Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent company, indicating no separate NCI.
